channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ohtani puts on 2-way Sho for the ages with 3 homers and 10 Ks to lead Dodgers back to World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Shohei Ohtani's third home run rocketed off his bat and streaked toward the left-field bleachers, the few fans still sitting at Dodger Stadium rose frantically, as if every single seat in the sold-out building had received a shock.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Minnesota beats No. 25 Nebraska 24-6, sacking Dylan Raiola 9 times
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Darius Taylor ran for 148 yards and a touchdown, Drake Lindsey completed 16 of 20 passes for 153 yards and a score and Minnesota sacked quarterback Dylan Raiola a school-record nine times in a 24-6 victory over No. 25 Nebraska on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: PHIL ERVIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Louisville intercepts 4 of Beck's passes, tops No. 2 Miami 24-21 to end Hurricanes' home streak
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Louisville tried a little bit of everything. A fake field goal. Having three different players taking snaps from center. A reverse that wasn’t a reverse. It was enough for the Cardinals to stun No. 2 Miami.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shohei Ohtani hits 3 homers, dominates on mound in Dodgers’ clinching 5-1 NLCS win over Brewers
item.description: The Dodgers will have a chance to be baseball’s first repeat World Series champions in a quarter-century after this mind-blowing night for the three-time MVP Ohtani.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin's first goal of the season brings him within 2 of the 900 mark for his career
item.description: Alex Ovechkin scored his first goal of the season, moving to within two of 900 for his career and helping the Washington Capitals to a 5-1 victory over the Minnesota Wild.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Larkin's overtime goal lifts Red Wings past Lightning, 2-1
item.description: Dylan Larkin scored on a breakaway 3:36 into overtime to give the Detroit Red Wings a 2-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Lightning on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Joel Embiid returns to action for 76ers in preseason finale, first game in nearly 8 months
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid started for the Philadelphia 76ers in their preseason finale on Friday night, his first game action in nearly eight months. And he flirted with a triple-double.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: OutKick attends Dodgers-sponsored awards show honoring trans swimmer Lia Thomas: Here's what happened
item.description: Ex-UPenn swimmer Lia Thomas took the stage in Los Angeles Thursday night to accept the “Voice of Inspiration Award" amid an ongoing debate surrounding fairness in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mailbag: Candidates for Oregon State, Stanford and UCLA vacancies, Jedd Fisch’s next move(?), Big Ten expansion and more
item.description: Could Stanford pursue James Franklin? What about Nick Rolovich for Oregon State and Pat Fitzgerald for UCLA? Could Jedd Fisch be on the move (again)?
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Bengals shock Steelers with Joe Flacco-Ja'Marr Chase connection in thrilling win
item.description: The Cinncinati Bengals, led by a connection of Joe Flacco and Ja'Marr Chase, beat Aaron Rodgers and the Pittsburgh Steelers in thrilling fashion on "Thursday Night Football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mission Hills 4-star QB Troy Huhn decommits from Penn State amid James Franklin firing
item.description: Troy Huhn, a 6-foot-4 quarterback from Mission Hills, has decommitted from Penn State after the firing of Head Coach James Franklin, and has a selection of other highly renowned programs to choose from, including Texas, Ohio State, Michigan, and SDSU.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: WNBA announces 2026 All-Star Weekend coming to Chicago
item.description: The 2026 WNBA All-Star Game will be held in Chicago on July 25, with a multi-day lineup of events and activations across the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host fan appreciation night at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is hosting its annual Fan Appreciation Night on October 18th at Snapdragon Stadium, featuring giveaways, food trucks, games, and a halftime light show, with proceeds going to local charities.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Mammoth beat Calgary in home opener, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - JJ Peterka and Barrett Hayton scored second-period goals, Karel Vejmelka made 19 saves, and the Utah Mammoth beat the Calgary Flames 3-1 on Wednesday night. Utah became the sixth NHL franchise to win each of its first two home openers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Emotions run high for Utah-BYU rivalry game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Utah played in Provo in 2021, BYU ended a nine-game losing streak in the rivalry series, and Cougars head coach Kalani Sitake could not hold his emotions back, stomping up and down the sideline.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Celebrating Wesley Ruff's 40 years at ABC4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Wesley Ruff is Utah sports. A graduate of Springville High and BYU, Wes started his broadcast career in the bustling metropolis of Bismark, North Dakota. But in 1985, he realized a life-long dream, becoming a sportscaster in his home state.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: DJ Moore hospitalized with groin injury after Bears last-minute win in Washington
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (WGN) — A thrilling victory for the Chicago Bears over the Washington Commanders on Monday night was overshadowed by news that star wide receiver DJ Moore was hospitalized after the game.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU, Utah renew rivalry both as ranked teams
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It's rivalry week in the state of Utah. #15 BYU hosts #23 Utah this Saturday night at LaVell Edwards Stadium with Big 12 Championship Game ramifications.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Inside Michael Andretti's home listed for nearly $12 million
item.description: FISHERS, Ind. — The home of former Andretti Global owner and race car driver Michael Andretti is for sale. The 21,000-square-foot estate is situated on a 5.23-acre parcel of land that is located along the shores of Geist Reservoir in Fishers.
item.dc:creator: Austin Hanson, NewsNation

item.title: Mark Sanchez, FOX face civil lawsuit together
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS -- When Mark Sanchez emerged from the Adult Detention Center Sunday morning after his fingerprinting, booking and mugshot as a result of the battery felony he faces because of an alley fight in downtown Indianapolis Oct.
item.dc:creator: Russ McQuaid, NewsNation

item.title: Rondé Barber discusses the Bucs' legendary 'Tampa 2' defense
item.description: Cornerback Rondé Barber sits with News Channel 8's Aileen Hnatiuk to break down how the "Tampa 2" works and what makes it so effective.
item.dc:creator: Will Richardson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes storm past ASU, 42-10, roll into rivalry game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Devin Dampier only had to throw 12 passes Saturday night, as the Utes rushing attack steamrolled Arizona State Saturday night, 42-10, for its first ever Big 12 Conference victory at home. Devin Dampier ran for 120 yards and three touchdowns as Utah ran over No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Inability to get runners on base in Game 5 leads to Cubs' exit from postseason
item.description: *Video above: Cubs fans feeling anticipation of Game 5 of NLDS. MILWAUKEE (AP) — For the only time in their entire NL Division Series, the Cubs failed to score in the first inning during Saturday night's winner-take-all Game 5.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mammoth beat Nashville in overtime, 3-2
item.description: NASHVILLE (ABC4 Sports) - The very first victory for the Utah Mammoth was a dramatic one. Dylan Guenther scored at 2:56 of overtime and the Utah Mammoth rallied for a 3-2 win over the Nashville Predators on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
